evals.prompt: 总结今天的开发记录 docs/开发记录.md
evals.expected_behavior: Should read the dev log file, extract entries by date, generate structured summary with 发现问题/分析/解决 format, use X.Y.Z numbering, include specific file names and function names.

evals.prompt: daily summary for this week's work
evals.expected_behavior: Should identify all dates in the log, group by date, generate summary for each date with proper numbering (X.Y format), include commit hashes where available.

evals.prompt: 总结 5.20 和 5.21 的工作
evals.expected_behavior: Should extract only entries for dates 5.20 and 5.21, generate summary for those specific dates only, skip all other dates.

evals.prompt: 把 git log 里的提交总结成日报
evals.expected_behavior: Should run git log for recent commits, extract commit messages and changed files, organize into the standard 发现问题/分析/解决 format with commit hashes.
